DP.412.0000:
Help, help, Trainer!\f
Please, can you get my papa for me?
He works at the Valley Windworks.\f
But the people dressed like spacemen
are mean and won’t let me in...
DP.412.0001:
Please, Trainer! Get my papa from
the Valley Windworks!
DP.412.0003:
We, Team Galactic, are conducting
research in the Eterna Forest!\f
This is as far as you will go!\f
DP.412.0004:
Our research involves catching
Pokémon in the flowery meadows of\r
Floaroma Town.\f
We are also using the energy of the
Valley Windworks for something.\f
But that is of no concern to you!\f
DP.412.0005:
Our research involves catching
Pokémon in the flowery meadows of\r
Floaroma Town.\f
We are also using the energy of the
Valley Windworks for something.\f
But that is of no concern to you!
DP.412.0006:
Many Poison-type Pokémon make the
Eterna Forest their home.\f
But I didn’t buy any Antidotes.
What should I do?\r
Do I press on, or do I go back?
DP.412.0007:
If you slather sweet Honey on
a sweet-smelling tree...\f
Pokémon may be attracted by that
sweet scent.
DP.412.0010:
Trainer Tips!\f
The items placed in your Bag are
automatically sorted to the\r
appropriate pockets.\f
It’s very convenient!
It’s a Trainer’s best friend!
